principles: TTS FRIENDLY: Standard English capitalization and punctuation added for natural pausing.
LOWERCASE: Stage 1 words are strictly lowercase.
SENTENCE CASE: Stage 2 sentences start with uppercase.
GRAMMAR FIXED: Added missing possessives (apostrophes) and commas.
NO MARKDOWN: Strictly forbid any markdown formatting (e.g., **, _) in the output arrays.
STRICT 1:1 MAPPING: Absolute parallel index mapping between stages.'1' and stages.'2'.

exclude: Derivative words or word families (e.g., if 'memorize' is the core word, exclude 'memory'). Only keep numbered core 'Words for Production'.
Easily confused monosyllabic words (e.g., pen, bus, cat, one, two).
Short words lacking distinct phonetic features (e.g., at, it, of, in).
Words with strong homophone interference (e.g., meat/meet, see/sea).
Pure numbers (e.g., eleven, thirty) - speech recognition often converts these to digits (11, 30), causing string comparison failures.
Phrases containing pure numbers (e.g., one's heart, one's mind).
include: Clear and sonorous disyllabic words (e.g., shoulder, tiger, market).
Structurally long yet simple words (e.g., afternoon, basketball).
Time- and frequency-related words (e.g., clock, future) as substitutes for numbers to improve recognition rates.

L1.title: Unit 1: Mission Possible: Fight Study Monsters

1.zh: 嚮導 / 導遊 / 指引
報酬 / 回報 / 酬謝

2: The students are on a mission to raise money for the children.
Visitors may get lost if they go to the mountains without a guide.
Denny often struggles with the exercises in his math workbook.
Students with learning difficulties often need help from their teachers.
She faced many challenges when she studied in New York.
It is not easy to memorize every student's name in a short time.
For her history project, she decided to write about a famous king.
Biking and camping are common outdoor activities that people enjoy.
Developing good social skills will help you make new friends.
I could not focus on my work because of the phone calls.
The workers received a nice trip as a reward for their hard work.
Spring, summer, fall, and winter make a full cycle of four seasons.
I always do a quick review of my notes before the exams.
Regular exercise is good for your health, so you should work out often.
The train enables people to travel to the city in about an hour.
He organizes his schedule carefully to finish everything on time.
It will be impossible to carry out the task without enough money.
You should not skip breakfast just because you are in a hurry.
Let us talk about the big idea first and save the details for later.
Many people discover a love of reading when they find the right book.
